title: Twilight Forest: The Lost Blocks
description: Adds missing blocks to Twilight Forest for the builders!
body: ![](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/TyYh3b27/images/a26a7b2401f6afd461a8618dbaea9ef4638a61fc.png) ## About the Mod Strange how some blocks are missing in Twilight Forest even though it looks like they would be AMAZING additions? This addon mod introduces the missing blocks as well as making Towerwood a fully-fledged wood type! That's a lot of choices for builders! Features: * Over 60 new blocks have been added! * Integrates vanilla recipe advancement system. * Matches the aesthetics of Twilight Forest. List of new blocks: * Aurora Stairs and Walls (Tintable!) * Auroralized Glass Panes * Castle Brick Slabs and Walls (+ Bold, Encased, Cracked, Worn, and Mossy variant) * Deadrock Slabs and Stairs (+ Cracked & Weathered) * Towerwood Slabs, Stairs, Fences, Fence Gates, Doors, Trapdoors, Pressure Plates, Buttons, Signs, and Banisters * Mossy Towerwood Slabs and Stairs * Mazestone Slabs, Stairs, and Walls (+ Cut, Brick, and Mossy Brick variant) * Nagastone Slabs (Left & Right variant, includes Mossy and Weathered) * Underbrick Slabs, Stairs, and Walls (+ Cracked and Mossy variant) Requirements: This addon requires having the [Twilight Forest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest) mod installed to function. Permissions: You may add this to your modpack as long as you give credit! :) You may port this mod to Fabric if you desire. It will mean a lot! ## Special Promotions I've partnered with RocketNode Hosting! RocketNode provides top-tier server hosting worldwide, allowing you to set up your server with just a few clicks! Their intuitive dashboard makes server management a breeze, and you can even schedule automatic restarts without needing any coding knowledge. Use the code KITTEH to get 25% off your first month on any of their gaming servers. Get started here: https://rocketnode.com/kitteh
